articles.title: IMD Warns of Hotter June and Rising Heatwave Risk - pragativadi.com
articles.full_text: News, as it should be covered, has been the forte of Pragativadi over the years. And this has ensured a classy readership encompassing the who’s who of the state. The people who matter in Odisha, depend on Pragativadi. For opinion leaders, decision makers and people with surplus disposable income Pragativadi is a must.
